rulings.Case Title: OPENTABLE, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. SMART RESTAURANT SOLUTIONS, INC. A DELAWARE CORP. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, APRIL 26, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT SMART RESTAURANT SOLUTIONS, INC.'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel IS GRANTED. COGGAN & TARLOW ARE TO GIVE NOTICE BY FAX, OVERNIGHT MAIL AND PERSONAL SERVICE OF THE COURT'S ORDER AND NOTICE OF THE UPCOMING DATES. THE NOTICE BY FAX AND MAIL IS TO BE COMPLETED BY MONDAY, APRIL 30, 2007 AND PERSONAL SERVICE BY MAY 2, 2007. NOTICE ALSO IS TO BE GIVEN TO LAW FIRMS WILSON SONSINI AND SEYFARTH SHAW BY FAX BY FRIDAY, APRIL 27, 2007. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: PAULA VAIL VS. PHILIP LARSON et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, APRIL 26, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT PHILIP LARSON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGEMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RELATED TO WHETHER DEFENDANT WAS INTOXICATED. EVIDENCE: DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION ONE IS OVERRULED. OBJECTION TWO IS SUSTAINED AS TO THE COMPLAINTS AND OVERRULED AS TO THE INTERROGATORY ANSWER. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES HANSELL et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS B/P AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, APRIL 26, 2007, LINE 14. DEFENDANT SLAKEY BROTHERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION DOES NOT CLARIFY WHICH SLAKEY STORE HE VISITED. NO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY ANSWERS HAVE BEEN PROVIDED. THUS, DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO MEET THE BURDEN UNDER SCHEIDING V DINWIDDIE CONSTRUCTION CO. (1999) 69 CAL APP 4TH 64. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: BARRY L WHITE VS. BETSY E TORRALBA et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, APRIL 26, 2007, LINE 6. PLAINTIFF BARRY WHITE'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED GENERAL DENIAL IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION: SECOND AND THIRD AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION: SECOND, THIRD, FOURTH AND FIFTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION: SECOND, THIRD, FOURTH, FIFTH AND SIXTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION: SECOND, THIRD AND FOURTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION: SECOND, FOURTH, FIFTH, SIXTH AND SEVENTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND EACH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE BASED ON SET OFF TO SPELL OUT IN MORE DETAIL THE BREACH OF CONTRACT AND WRONGFUL CONDUCT. OVERRULE DEMURRERS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BASED ON FAILURE TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION AND SET OFF. =(302/PJM/KD)
